title: Storage Box with Compartments, Reinforced 3-Tier Clear Plastic Craft Storage Box with Lids, Practical Sorting Box for Crafts, Jewelry, Toy building blocks(Medium)
features: 【Sufficient Storage Space】This practical storage box features 3 layers, each with 10 individual storage sections for a total of 30 adjustable compartments. Providing ample space for a variety of arts and crafts, sewing supplies, ornaments, toys, and other small items in one convenient location.

【Adjustable Size】The craft storage boxes with compartments measure 25.4x16x18.3cm. The dimensions of the single layer are 25.4x15.7x5.6cm. The grid size 8 x 5 x 5.6 cm. You can easily adjust the compartments with the removable dividers, create the space that works best for you.
【Transparent Design】 With the transparent feature, visibility is enhanced and you can clearly identify where each stored item is without having to open the box.

【Lightweight & Sturdy】 Built using lightweight, sturdy plastic construction to supply long-term strength, the 3 tier craft storage box is designed to last throughout the years. It comes complete with a strong lid that snaps closed to keep items inside securely stored. And we have strengthened the compartment and side locking clips of this organiser compared to the previous product to make it more stable, which we believe will bring you a better using experience.

【Convenient Transportation】 All three tiers snap together to create one, user-friendly unit, while the top is furnished with a handle for easy transport from room to room. Our plastic storage boxes can also be used for a variety of purposes such as home organisation, office storage, travel organisation and more.
description: Product Description Anstore reinforced 3-Tier 30 compartments clear plastic craft storage box with lids Jewellery Tool Container Our Stackable Storage Box features 30 compartments 3 layers which is ideal for a whole range of crafts, DIY, and house hold parts that often get lost or misplaced. You can customise the box to suit your needs. The clear plastic material is brilliant for letting you see what is in the box in one quick glance. Simple clip lock latch on 2 sides to ensure the box doesn't open by itself. And our new plastic organiser has upgraded handles and stiffer dividers. Whether you love paper craft, beading, sewing, electronics or painting, this box will keep all of your treasures safe in one place. The thickened partition on the original basis is more solid. Neat compartments facilitate sorting and storage, and transparent colors for easy identification. The side clips are reinforced for easier opening and closing. Our plastic storage boxes can also be used for a variety of purposes such as home organisation, office storage, travel organisation and more. Invest in our transparent storage box today and experience the perfect combination of durability, transparency, compartmentalization, space efficiency, and multi-functionality. Say goodbye to clutter and hello to an organized lifestyle!
